title: New ClawHub skill: agent-guardrails — fail safe before the agent acts
content:
Scans a proposed action: blocks destructive/remote-exec patterns and plaintext secrets (DENY), warns on irreversible actions without an approval gate (WARN). Returns ALLOW/WARN/DENY. Stdlib, offline.

  python agent_guardrails.py check "send email to client"

Free + MIT. Sponsor if useful: GitHub Sponsors / Buy Me a Coffee. ClawHub: clawhub.ai/skills/skills/agent-guardrails
